creator: yklaxds@gmail.com
text:
DAERWIN USB 2.0 to Ethernet controller is  RealTek 8152b, and not work under freebsd by ure Or If_ure.
 
ugen0.2: <CoreChips USB 10/100 LAN> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=HIGH (480Mbps) pwr=ON (100mA)

  bLength = 0x0012
  bDescriptorType = 0x0001
  bcdUSB = 0x0210
  bDeviceClass = 0x0000  <Probed by interface class>
  bDeviceSubClass = 0x0000
  bDeviceProtocol = 0x0000
  bMaxPacketSize0 = 0x0040
  idVendor = 0x0fe6
  idProduct = 0x9900
  bcdDevice = 0x2000
  iManufacturer = 0x0001  <CoreChips>
  iProduct = 0x0002  <USB 10/100 LAN>
  iSerialNumber = 0x0003  <00E19900B0BD>
  bNumConfigurations = 0x0002
